title: dortmanna hyssopifolia
intro: Dortmanna hyssopifolia, also known as the Dortmann's hyssop, is a flowering plant species in the family of Boraginaceae. It is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as alleviating coughs, colds, and fever, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Dortmanna hyssopifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to calm respiratory problems and promote overall well-being.
